acceptance_criteria.text: Refresh result and refresh job list include billing state.
Billing state includes reserved, charged, released, overage, provider actual cost, multiplier, and actual credits when available.
Apify settlement stores actual-cost metadata on the reservation for UI display.
gaps: Old settlements without metadata show only reservation credit fields.

acceptance_criteria.text: Web Operator renders refresh billing details clearly.
gaps: No authenticated browser inspection of a real paid refresh job.

known_gaps: Old settlements without metadata show only reservation credit fields.
No authenticated browser inspection of a real paid refresh job.
